name: Earthquake Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Spray a 13 by 9-inch pan with Pam cooking spray.
3. Combine one cup chopped pecans and one cup coconut in the bottom of the prepared pan.
4. Prepare the chocolate cake mix according to the package directions.
5. Pour the cake batter over the pecans and coconut mixture.
6. In a separate bowl, beat together the cream cheese and powdered sugar until smooth.
7. Spoon the cream cheese mixture over the top of the cake batter.
8. Bake for one hour or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
